subcodes.first_line: O attracted leaf! Your letter was received and its perusal brought joy, for it testified to the flame of attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه نامه ات رسید و از قرائت سرور حاصل گردید زیرا دلالت بر شعله نار انجذاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
